name: Helm of Exalted Might
description: Notes Part of the Agents of Oryx Abilities.
effects: On party: Inflicts Berserk for 5.5 seconds within 5 squaresOn self: DEX Boost (+30 DEX) for 3 seconds and ATT Decrease (-15 ATT) for 5 secondsBattle Cry: On ability use, deals a burst of 1000 damage to enemies within 5 sqrs
